images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese gravure idol embodying a high school student aesthetic, lying gracefully atop a textured pile of autumn leaves within a dreamy pink haze. She is dressed in a form-fitting, trendy maid costume featuring sheer lace and silk accents that accentuate her slim waist and curvy figure, with frilled hems contrasting against the natural foliage. Captured from a high-angle overhead view, she holds her phone aloft for a mirror selfie, her cool and distant expression locked onto the screen, creating a magnetic contrast with her joyful and radiant mood. The background is a blurred wash of ethereal fairy lights bokeh, illuminating her flawless skin texture and silky straight black hair with a soft, professional glow. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
